default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[First team meeting since a recent announcement, introducing new team members and discussing upcoming product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Team morale is generally positive despite recent changes and challenges](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Voice Agent API product announcement planned for next week (likely Thursday)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Traffic recovery efforts showing progress after recent dip (16K to \~20K daily clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Focus on leveraging announcements to re-engage all customer accounts](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Morale

  - [Most team members reported feeling positive about work (6-8/10 range)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Personal highlights included vacations, relocations, and fitness goals](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [Shadi (new member) shared sales pipeline progress and excitement about sales-marketing alignment](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Marcel expressed gratitude for team culture and bittersweet feelings about his transition](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### Traffic Recovery Efforts

  - [Recent traffic drop from \~25K to 16K daily clicks](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Kavishka's efforts praised for quick response and strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [Current traffic recovered to \~20K daily clicks (still 15x pre-strategy levels)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Voice Agent API Launch

  - [Planned announcement: Next week (likely Thursday, possibly Tuesday/Wednesday)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Framed as public launch with gated early access](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [CTA: "Contact us to get started"](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [GA release slated for October (about a month later)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Demo video clips in progress by Peter](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Email and social copy drafts underway (Alexa, Patricia)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Launch Strategy

  - [Potential date adjustment based on press release pickup](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [No strong customer references available yet (e.g., Coca-Cola paused marketing support)](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Post-launch: Focus on influencer campaigns and customer spotlights](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Emphasis on using announcement to re-engage all existing accounts](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

### Early Access Process

  - [Not a whitelist system; available via production endpoint](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Default: Single concurrent stream](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Vetting focused on selecting early build partners](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Prioritization based on intent to buy, opportunity size, and use case breadth](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Josh to finalize announcement draft and coordinate with Peter on demo video clips](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Alexa and Patricia to complete email and social copy](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Marcel to discuss early access process with Peter in afternoon meeting](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Team to prepare for using announcement to re-engage all customer accounts](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [New team members (Shadi, Anoop) to familiarize with weekly Geekbot updates and meeting structure](https://fathom.video/share/AuGBx2ZtjqDpuSwupNDDpUMuixX-8sSz?tab=summary&timestamp=1474.0)

action_items.description: Give product team access to approve early access signups for Voice Agent API and discuss approval process
